---
subtitle: "Infrastructure-as-Code Strategies for Reducing Cloud Spend"
---

# Terraform Cloud Cost Control {.unnumbered}

## Preface {.unnumbered}

Terraform Cloud pricing looks simple on the surface — free for small teams, pay-per-resource beyond that. But when your infrastructure-as-code practice scales across multiple environments, workspaces, and teams, costs can escalate from dollars to thousands per month with surprising speed.

This guide breaks down exactly how Terraform Cloud costs accumulate, where the hidden multipliers live, and what strategies reduce your bill by 40-70% without compromising your IaC workflow.

## Who This Book Is For {.unnumbered}

- **DevOps engineers** managing Terraform Cloud workspaces at scale
- **Platform teams** building self-service IaC platforms for their organization
- **Engineering managers** evaluating Terraform Cloud vs. alternatives
- **FinOps practitioners** tracking and optimizing IaC platform costs
